verses.text: Jerusalem khuanai, Bethfage leh Bethany khuaneute a omna Oliv Mual a tun' uh ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite nih ma sawl a
“Mai-a om khua-ah va pai un. Khua na tun' phetun, kuamah a tuan' ngei nailohna lano khat khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. Hong sut un la hong kai un
Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Bang hangin tua la khau sut na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi; hih lai mahah kong kaikikpah ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi
Amaute gel zong paipah uh a, kongzinga kong gei khatah lano a kikhih khat mu uh ahih manin a khau a sutpah uh hi
Tua kiima om mite in, “Bang hangin tua lano khau sut na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Jesuh' vaikhak thuteng gen uh a, bangmah cih nawnlo uh hi
Jesuh kiangah a lano tun'pih uh a, a lano tungah a puan uh phahin a tungah Jesuh a tuang hi
Mi tampite in ama paina ding lampi-ah a puan uh na phah uh a, mi pawlkhat in lolai panin a sat uh sawlpangte na phah uh hi
Jesuh' mai-a a pai mite leh a nunga a zui mite in, “Pasian phat un! Topa' tangin a hong pai mipa, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen
A hong tungding i pu David' ukna, Pasian in thupha pia ta hen! Pasian phat un!” ci-in a awng uh hi
Tua bangin Jerusalem khuasungah Jesuh lut a, biakinn sungah pai-in na khempeuh a en kawikawi hi. Tua ciangin ni niam khinta ahih manin sawmlenihte tawh Bethany khua-ah a pai hi.
A zing ciangin Bethany khua pan paikhia uh a, Jesuh a gil a kial hi
A teh a no theikung khat galmuh ahih manin a gahkhak leh ci-in a lo dingin a va pai hi. Thei min hun hilo ahih manin, a phung a tun' ciangin a teh simloh bangmah na omlo hi
Tua ciangin theikung kiangah, “Nang tung panin kuamah in theigah loin ne nawn kei ta hen,” a ci hi. Hih thu, a nungzuite in a za uh hi.
Jerusalem khua a tun' uh ciangin, biakinn huangsungah Jesuh lutin tua sungah sumzuak sumlei-a a omte hawlkhiat ding kipan a, sumkhekte' sabuaite lumlet sakin, vakhu zuakte' tutphahte sawnpaih sak hi
Biakinn huangsungah kuamah bangmah paipihsak lo hi

Tua ciangin mite kiangah thu hilh a, “Ka inn pen mi khempeuh-a' dingin thungetna inn kici ding hi,” ci-in Pasian in a genna thu Lai Siangtho sungah kigelh hilo ahi hiam? Ahi zongin note in guta buluhte' bukna mun na suaksak uh hi, ci-in thu a hilh hi

Siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Jesuh a thahtheihna ding uh lampi a zong uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpi in ama thuhilhna lamdangsa uh ahih manin amaute in Jesuh a kihta uh hi
A nitak ciangin khuapi panin Jesuh leh a nungzuite a paikhia uh hi.
A zingsang ciangin tua lampi mah zui-in a paikik ciangun tua theikung a zung dongin a sihna a mu uh hi
Peter in a thu phawk ahih manin, “Sia aw, na theikung samsiat a sita hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Upna nei un

Upna na neih nak uh leh hih mual kiangah, ‘Na omna panin paikhia-in tuipi sung kiden'na in,’ ci le uh cin, na lungsim sung uhah uplahna omloin na gen bangun piang taktak ding hi, ci-in na up nak uh leh, na cih bangun hong piang ding hi
Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Na khat peuhpeuh na nget uh ciangin ngah ding ci-in um un; tua hi leh na nget peuhpeuh uh na ngah ding uh hi
Thungen dingin na din' uh ciangin midang tungah na hehna uh a om khat peuhpeuh maisak un; tua hi leh vantungah a om na Pa un note' mawhna hong maisak ding hi
(Midangte' mawhna na maisak kei uh leh vantungah a om na Pa un note' mawhna zong hong maisaklo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.)
Tua ciangin Jerusalem tungkik leuleu uh hi. Biakinn kiimah Jesuh a vak kawikawi laitakin siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, leh upate hong pai uh a
“Hih nate, kua' thu tawh bawl a, na bawlna dingin kua in aana hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Keimah in note tungah thu khat kong dong masa ding hi; nong dawn' uh leh kei zong kua thu tawh ka bawl, cih kong gen ding hi
Johan in tui a phumtheihna ding thu Pasian kiang panin a ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihingte tung panin a ngah ahi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat kikum uh a, “Pasian kiang pan hi,” ci lehang, “Tua ahih leh bang hangin Johan' thu umlo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding a
“Mihingte' tung pan hi,” cih ding lah, mi khempeuh in Johan pen kamsang taktakin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mite i kihta zel hi, a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin, “Ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Jesuh in zong, “Hih nate kua thu tawh ka bawl cih thu kei zong kong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
